cases.name: Formatting edge manual-review shadow case
cases.notes: Uses the OCR formatting-edge fixture on both sides so we can track whether ODL preserves safety on parentheses negatives, blank comparative cells, and incomplete statement coverage.
knownEvidenceLimitations: The OpenDataLoader side for this case uses the repo OCR regression fixture as a captured stand-in for degraded OCR/hybrid output, not a live local or live hybrid ODL parse.

artifactGeneration.detail: Benchmark uses in-memory OCR fixtures only.
Benchmark used an OCR regression fixture as a captured stand-in for degraded OpenDataLoader OCR/hybrid output.

comparisonAssessment.summary: No material disagreement was detected between legacy and OpenDataLoader for this case.

cases.name: Formatting edge manual-review case

cases.name: Ambiguous manual-review live local ODL case

cases.name: Paired digital happy path
cases.notes: Legacy runs from inline PDF pages, while OpenDataLoader runs from a captured normalized JSON artifact representing the same core statement content.
knownEvidenceLimitations: The captured OpenDataLoader fixture omits the note-level declaration line 'Alle tall i notene er NOK 1.000 ...' that exists in the legacy inline PDF page, so the remaining note-page unit-scale disagreement is evidence-limited rather than a proven parser bug.

artifactGeneration.detail: Benchmark uses in-memory inline PDF pages only.
Benchmark used a captured OpenDataLoader JSON artifact from the repo.

summary.recommendation: keep legacy as default, OpenDataLoader shadow-only
summary.recommendationReason: Live benchmark-kjøringene er rene, og gjenværende uenigheter er forklart av captured-fixture-begrensninger. Evidensgrunnlaget er fortsatt for smalt til å endre rollout-postur, så OpenDataLoader forblir shadow-only.
